text: Healthy 3-year-old orange tabby cat. Indoor only. Good with children and other cats. Minor tartar buildup otherwise healthy. Ready for adoption.
2-year-old male Labrador Retriever mix found as stray. Friendly and energetic. Slightly underweight. Mild right front leg lameness resolving. Neutering scheduled.
5-year-old female Australian Shepherd mix. High energy working breed requiring 2+ hours exercise daily. Behavioral issues resolved with structured routine. Spayed.
